results.title: Buoy 10 Chinook Salmon Fishing Guides: Tours For First-Time Anglers Announced
results.description: Reel Time Fishing has announced its Buoy 10 salmon tours for first-time anglers, offering fully equipped, tide-timed Chinook and Coho experiences at the Columbia River mouth near Astoria, Oregon.

results.title: Magic McGinn, five-star Emery and what next for Villa? - Storylines after night of glory
results.description: Storylines from Aston Villa's UEFA Europa League win after beating SC Frieburg 3-0 in the final in Istanbul.

results.title: Aura Minerals (NASDAQ:AUGO) Releases Earnings Results
results.description: Aura Minerals (NASDAQ:AUGO – Get Free Report) issued its quarterly earnings data on Wednesday. The company reported $999.00 earnings per share for the quarter, Zacks reports.
